sourcesContent:
import { Component, OnInit } from '@angular/core'; @Component({ selector: 'app-sitemap', templateUrl: './sitemap.component.html', styleUrls: ['./sitemap.component.scss'] }) /** * Sitemap Component */ export class SitemapComponent implements OnInit { // bread crumb items breadCrumbItems!: Array<{}>; constructor() { } ngOnInit(): void { /** * BreadCrumb */ this.breadCrumbItems = [ { label: 'Pages' }, { label: 'Sitemap', active: true } ]; } }
